title: Batch 33 Group/File/Duplicate Control Execution
scientificQuestion: Can theory-guided mechanism trials distinguish overlap, duplicate transfer, class-metric effects, ambiguity, model sensitivity, replay instability, and ordinary benchmark difficulty?
domain: theory-guided protocol and leakage mechanism trials
limitations: Mechanism labels are bounded by the executed targets and controls.
No benchmark win or official reproduction claim is made.
A not-testable mechanism is treated as a limitation rather than a success.
